mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_readiness_batches ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, group_id BIGINT NOT NULL, owner_user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, batch_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CREATED', total_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ready_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, warning_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, rejected_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, avg_readiness_score DECIMAL(5,2), failure_reason TEXT, approved_by_user_id BIGINT, approved_at TIMESTAMP, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_batch_group FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES groups (id), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_batch_owner FOREIGN KEY (owner_user_id) REFERENCES users (id), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_batch_approver FOREIGN KEY (approved_by_user_id) REFERENCES users (id) )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_readiness_items ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, batch_id BIGINT NOT NULL, group_id BIGINT NOT NULL, original_file_name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, file_ext VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', file_size BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, content_type VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', file_hash VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', storage_bucket VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', storage_object_key VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', parse_status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', readiness_status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', recommended_group_id BIGINT, recommended_action VARCHAR(64), readiness_score DECIMAL(5,2), readiness_grade VARCHAR(32), parseable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, chunk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, avg_chunk_length INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, short_chunk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, long_chunk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, empty_chunk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, duplicate_chunk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, duplicate_document_id BIGINT, issue_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, analysis_summary TEXT, failure_reason TEXT, approved_by_user_id BIGINT, approved_at TIMESTAMP, imported_document_id BIGINT, decision_reason VARCHAR(255), topic_fit_status VARCHAR(32), topic_fit_score DECIMAL(5,2), topic_confidence DECIMAL(5,2), topic_reason TEXT, group_topic_keywords TEXT, document_topic_keywords TEXT, keyword_overlap_score DECIMAL(5,2), semantic_similarity_score DECIMAL(5,2), mismatch_indicators TEXT, suggested_target_group_id BIGINT, suggested_target_group_name VARCHAR(128), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_item_batch FOREIGN KEY (batch_id) REFERENCES document_readiness_batches (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_item_group FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES groups (id), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_item_recommended_group FOREIGN KEY (recommended_group_id) REFERENCES groups (id), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_item_duplicate_document FOREIGN KEY (duplicate_document_id) REFERENCES documents (id), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_item_imported_document FOREIGN KEY (imported_document_id) REFERENCES documents (id), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_item_approver FOREIGN KEY (approved_by_user_id) REFERENCES users (id) )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_readiness_issues ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, batch_id BIGINT NOT NULL, item_id BIGINT NOT NULL, issue_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, severity VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, message VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, suggestion VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_issue_batch FOREIGN KEY (batch_id) REFERENCES document_readiness_batches (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_readiness_issue_item FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES document_readiness_items (id) ON DELETE CASCADE )
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_readiness_batches_group_status ON document_readiness_batches (group_id, status, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_readiness_batches_owner_created ON document_readiness_batches (owner_user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_readiness_items_batch_status ON document_readiness_items (batch_id, readiness_status)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_readiness_items_group_hash ON document_readiness_items (group_id, file_hash)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_readiness_issues_item ON document_readiness_issues (item_id, severity)
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS topic_fit_status VARCHAR(32)
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS topic_fit_score DECIMAL(5,2)
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS topic_confidence DECIMAL(5,2)
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS topic_reason TEXT
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS group_topic_keywords TEXT
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS document_topic_keywords TEXT
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS keyword_overlap_score DECIMAL(5,2)
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS semantic_similarity_score DECIMAL(5,2)
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mismatch_indicators TEXT
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suggested_target_group_id BIGINT
ALTER TABLE document_readiness_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suggested_target_group_name VARCHAR(128)
